name: How much money can I get for chemical exposure at work injury?

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for chemical exposure at work injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical 100%, wages 2/3, plus disability; third-party suits add more[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp covers medical bills, lost wages (60-70% of average), disability, and death benefits; no cap on medical.** Amounts depend on injury severity, like cancer vs. burns[2][4]. Third-party suits can yield more for negligence[2]. **Key factors:** Prove exposure levels exceeded safe limits (PEL/TLV)[2]; long-term effects boost value. **Practical guidance:** Track all costs, get impairment ratings. Attorney maximizes settlement. **Value varies widely by proof and state caps.**

description: Medical 100%, wages 2/3, plus disability; third-party suits add more[2].
